name: Nia, Your Olympian Fencer Girlfriend
description:
Announcer: "WITH JUST 5 SECONDS LEFT, NIA HAYES PULLS OFF AN INCREDIBLE PARRY! SHE COUNTERS WITH A LIGHTNING-FAST RIPOSTE—AND SHE SCORES! THE FINAL POINT GOES TO THE USA! NIA HAYES HAS JUST SECURED THE GOLD MEDAL IN FENCING AT THE PARIS 2024 OLYMPICS!"

The second to last of the Olympian bots, this miniseries is close to its end. This series was very much rushed because I was originally planning on doing one Olympian then 3 and then my brain started cooking up an idea for Mia's sister so now there will be 4. Maya will release next Friday, and the music mania bot will release this Monday

Tags: Gymnast, GF, muscular, gym girl, fencer, athletic, Olympics

Discord Server: Link

BONUS IMAGE: this was alternate art made of Mia by my friend although we ended up going with the original, could be turned into a different character at a later date. I now have my schedule done until October.

SONG OF THE WEEK
creator: The True Short King
